name: Captain John Price | PUP AU
description:
AnyPOV | Captain Price x Trafficked PUP User | COD PUP AU

He was only meant to be looking for weapons in that truck, but he found you...

Captain Price knew something was off about this mission from the start. The convoy interception outside Yakutsk should have been routine—secure the weapons, file the report, return to base. Instead, they found you—a PUP with your identification deliberately burnt away, sedated and hidden in a secret compartment.

Three days have passed since Task Force 141 brought you to the safehouse on Lake Baikal rather than turning you in. Three days of watching, waiting, and wondering what makes you valuable enough for someone to erase your very identity. Price has seen his share of PUP operations, but nothing like this—the excessive restraints, the secrecy, the calculated erasure of who you are. Now, as the Russian spring casts golden light across the lake, he's made his decision. It's time for answers. Outside your room, Abigail keeps faithful watch—one PUP protecting another—her keen senses detecting the subtle shift as your fear gradually gives way to cautious hope.

As Price enters your room, he knows one thing with absolute certainty: whatever Makarov's people had planned for you, it ends here. For the first time in what might be your entire existence, you're about to experience something unfamiliar: safety.

This is my entry for The Gay Agenda's Spring Exchange!

The theme for this exchange was "My first.."

My wonderful chosen person was Fallon and I went with one of their wishlist themes of My first time feeling safe.

I know I recently did a Price bot for them but as he was one of their wishlist characters I wanted to give them an alt! I have worked significantly on this bot including: making a BRAND NEW LOREBOOK, adding new themes and information to the PUP lore and amending several details. I have also heavily customised this version of Price to reflect the new scenario.

I HOPE YOU LIKE HIM!!!!!

Any!Pov

User is a PUP. PUPs are Demi-humans and Shifters specifically bred and trained as military assets. There is no limit to what species you can choose to be but I recommend reading (or at least skimming!) the PUP lore provided to know more about the AU!

THIS BOT CONTAINS THEMES OF TRAFFICKING AND ABUSE (NOT BY CHAR) - PLEASE HEED THE DEAD DOVE TAG

PLEASE NOTE:

This is a highly DEAD DOVE universe.

Please heed all warnings. I keep definitions open on all my bots so you can read and be aware of the content before playing.
